q: Do you prefer studying alone or with others?
examiner_note:
Câu hỏi này về phong cách học tập. 
- **Hướng dẫn trả lời**: Bạn có thể chọn học một mình (tập trung cao, chủ động thời gian) hoặc học nhóm (trao đổi ý tưởng, hỗ trợ lẫn nhau). Giải thích lý do tại sao. 
- **Mẹo**: Sử dụng các cụm từ như 'solitary study', 'collaborative learning', 'group discussion', 'distraction-free', 'brainstorming', 'peer support', 'individual pace'.

band7.text: I personally prefer studying alone because it helps me to stay focused and not get distracted by other people talking. I can also choose my own time and place to study, which is very convenient and efficient for me.
band7.note: Trả lời rõ ràng, nêu ưu điểm của việc học một mình (tự do, tập trung). Ngôn ngữ tự nhiên.

band8.text: It really depends on the task at hand. For subjects that require deep concentration like Math, I prefer solitary study. However, for more creative projects, I find collaborative learning to be much more effective as it allows for brainstorming and peer feedback.
band8.note: Trả lời linh hoạt ('depends on the task'). Sử dụng từ vựng tốt ('solitary study', 'collaborative learning', 'brainstorming').

band9.text: I'm generally inclined towards solitary study, as it allows me to progress at my own individual pace without any external interruptions. That said, I do recognize the immense value of group discussions for broadening my perspective and gaining new insights through peer support.
band9.note: Từ vựng ở trình độ rất cao ('inclined towards', 'individual pace', 'immense value', 'broadening perspective', 'insights'). Diễn đạt cực kỳ học thuật và gãy gọn.

v.example: I find that solitary study is the best way for me to prepare for final exams.
Collaborative learning encourages students to share ideas and support each other.
Group discussions can help students gain a deeper understanding of complex topics.
I need a distraction-free environment to get my best work done.
We had a productive brainstorming session and came up with many new ideas for the project.

v.meaning: sự hỗ trợ từ bạn bè
v.example: Peer support can be a great source of motivation during stressful times.
One of the advantages of online courses is that you can study at your own individual pace.
She is more inclined towards artistic subjects than scientific ones.
Volunteering can be of immense value both to the community and to the volunteer.
Traveling to different countries is a great way to broaden your perspective.

v.meaning: có được cái nhìn sâu sắc/hiểu biết
v.example: The researcher gained valuable insights into the behavior of the animals.

v.meaning: sự gián đoạn từ bên ngoài
v.example: I try to minimize external interruptions by turning off my phone notifications.
I need to focus on the task at hand and not worry about future deadlines.
Noise from the street was breaking my concentration.
I find that my productivity is highest in the early morning.
The new system is much more efficient than the old one.
The university library is very convenient for me to study in after class.
Everyone has different study preferences; some like total silence, while others prefer music.
The teacher encouraged the students to interact more during the lesson.
Constructive feedback is essential for improving your performance.
Lack of motivation can be a major problem for long-term projects.
Studying at home requires a lot of self-discipline to avoid distractions.
The school promotes autonomous learning to help students become independent thinkers.
The school has a peer-to-peer mentoring program for new students.
The social aspect of university life is just as important as the academic one.
The project was a great opportunity to practice our teamwork skills.
The two countries are in a cooperative agreement to protect the environment.
The discussion was very stimulating and gave me many new ideas.
The film on climate change was very thought-provoking.
Conferences are a great place for intellectual exchange between researchers.

v.meaning: sự đa dạng trong tư duy
v.example: A successful team benefits from a wide diversity of thought and experience.
The synergy between the two companies led to a very successful partnership.
The report provides a comprehensive analysis of the current market trends.
The historical project aims to provide a multi-perspective view of the conflict.
She has a very logical and analytical mind.
It's important to develop critical reading skills to avoid being misled by fake news.
Scientists try to remain objective and unbiased in their research.
Our interpretation of art is often very subjective and personal.
He's very independent and likes to do things his own way.
I'm lucky to have a very supportive group of friends.
The positive feedback I received was very encouraging.
Learning to play the violin is a challenging but rewarding process.
Finishing the marathon was the most satisfying achievement of my life.
Helping others brings her a great sense of personal fulfillment.
High levels of student engagement are linked to better academic outcomes.
Social interaction is essential for human well-being.
She felt a strong connection with the local community.
The team worked well together in a very harmonious way.
The software allows for collaborative editing of documents in real-time.
Some cultures are more individualistic, while others are more community-oriented.
